narrative:
Precinct Saybrook Twp. 8 (precinct in Ashtabula County) has 417 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.1%, a modest Republican lean of 2.6 percentage points.
